overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a female character exploring a rocky outdoor environment resembling a zoo or wildlife park exhibit. The character walks along dirt paths through open rocky terrain and tropical vegetation areas under bright sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky canyon passage opening into exhibit area

events.description: character emerges from narrow rocky corridor into open rocky terrain

agents.ego_description: walking forward through a narrow passage between rock walls, then emerging into an open rocky area

entered.detail: tall textured rock wall forming the passage boundary
massive angular rock structure with green moss patches
reddish-brown dirt and gravel walking surface

segments.scene_description: The character begins in a narrow rocky corridor with tall cliff walls on the right, then emerges into a wide open area featuring large angular rock formations. The ground is reddish dirt and gravel, with sparse vegetation visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rocky exhibit terrain with scattered formations

events.description: character turns left while continuing to walk, changing direction toward vegetated area

agents.ego_description: walking across open rocky terrain, making a gradual left turn while surveying the surroundings

entered.detail: cluster of green deciduous trees marking the edge of the rocky area

segments.scene_description: The character traverses a wide open area surrounded by large rock formations and boulders. The camera turns left as the character walks, revealing more of the rocky landscape and distant trees on the left horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional path between rocky outcrops and tropical vegetation

events.description: environment transitions from open rocky terrain to tree-lined path with denser vegetation

agents.ego_description: walking along a dirt path approaching an area with more trees and tropical plants

entered.detail: medium-sized green trees providing shade along the path
textured stone barrier structure with weathered surface
tropical palm trees indicating a climate transition

segments.scene_description: The character moves from open rocky terrain into a more vegetated corridor. Deciduous trees appear on the left while stone walls and palm trees emerge ahead, signaling a transition to a tropical exhibit section.

scene_state.functional_zone: tropical vegetation corridor with banana plants

events.description: character enters dense tropical area with large banana leaves overhead
character pauses briefly to look around the tropical environment

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through a tropical section with large banana plants, occasionally looking around at the vegetation

entered.detail: large tropical banana plants with broad green leaves overhanging the path
dense green undergrowth and tropical vegetation

segments.scene_description: The character explores a lush tropical section featuring large banana plants with broad leaves creating partial canopy overhead. The path winds between stone structures and dense tropical foliage, with the character pausing to observe the surroundings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a stark, rocky canyon into a lush, tropical sanctuary. It begins within a narrow rocky corridor with towering cliff walls before emerging into a wide expanse of reddish dirt and angular boulders. As the character traverses this open terrain, the camera turns left to reveal a distant horizon of trees, signaling a shift in the landscape. The scene then moves from the arid rocks into a vegetated corridor where deciduous trees and stone walls give way to palm trees. Finally, the path winds into a dense tropical section, where broad banana leaves create a partial canopy overhead and the environment becomes a lush thicket of foliage and stone structures.
